title: TagType public enum missing #[non_exhaustive]
description: content::TagType is a public enum (pub enum TagType) with two variants (Hashtag, Mention). Per the coding standards: put #[non_exhaustive] on public error enums — and more broadly on any public enum whose variant set is expected to grow. ActivityPub has additional tag types (Emoji, etc.) that broadside may support in the future. Without #[non_exhaustive], downstream crates that match on TagType would need to be updated in lockstep. Adding the attribute is a non-breaking addition.
